title: A & B TRADERS Wonderdry Tea Towels Kitchen Pack of 10, Cotton Absorbent Long Lasting Catering Bar Towels (Grey)
features: WONDERDRY COTTON TEA TOWELS: Crafted from finest cotton, these tea towels offer the perfect combination of absorbency and durability, making them the ideal choice for your kitchen. These Tea Towels can be used as Dish Cloths. These Classic Wonderdry Tea Towel sets are lint free and Absorbent. Our Wonderdry tea towels are designed for fast drying, making them ideal for busy kitchens. Say goodbye to damp towels; these absorbent towels get the job done efficiently.

VERSATILE USE: These multi-purpose tea towels are not just for drying dishes; they also serve as excellent glass cloths. Say goodbye to streaks and spots on your glassware. These tea towels are not just for the kitchen; they're also perfect for use in bars, restaurants, and catering events. They can handle spills, clean glassware, and help maintain a pristine work environment. Made from the finest cotton and long lasting. Perfect for catering, restaurants, bars and hotels.

BUNDLE / PACKS: With a generous pack of 6 or10 tea towels, you'll always have a fresh one on hand. Whether you're hosting a dinner party or running a busy kitchen, these towels are up to the task. Whether you're a home cook or a professional chef, these tea towels for kitchen use are your reliable companions for efficient dish cleaning and maintaining a pristine kitchen. Experience the difference that Wonderdry brings to your daily culinary adventures with these quick dry towels.

LONG-LASTING DURABILITY: Built to withstand frequent use and laundering, these mono check tea towels maintain their quality and color even after numerous washes. They are a cost-effective and eco-friendly choice.These mono check tea towels are Ideal for the home and Kitchen use. Designed for fast drying, these kitchen towels are perfect for busy culinary environments. Keep your workspace clean and dry effortlessly.
DIMENSIONS: 50x 75cm. Machine Washable at 40C. Wash Before use, do not use bleach or fabric softener. Available in Pack of 6 Mix, Pack of 10 Mix, Blue, Black, Grey, Green & Red Checks.
